candidate_definition_hints.text: Official C# support for Visual Studio Code

A [Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/) [extension](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/VSCode) that provides rich language support for C# and is shipped along with [C# Dev Kit][csdevkitextension]. Powered by a Language Server Protocol (LSP) server, this extensio…
